message:
chore(deps): refresh Cargo.lock for asupersync v0.2.0 from crates.io

The lock file was stale, still pointing to a git rev for asupersync.
This refresh aligns it with the Cargo.toml which already specifies
version = "0.2.0" from the crates.io registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
